name: zig-holodex
description: Zig library for the Holodex API with pretty formatting

releases.body:
# Changelog

- upgraded zig version to 0.16.0
- add API convenience functions for async

# Changelog

- upgraded zig version to 0.15.2
- removed "raw" and "pretty" format specifiers as stdlib changes mean that we can no longer access them. The "pretty" format is now used by default.
- user-passed allocators are now only used for allocating the response, instead of intermediate allocations
- added `holodex.pretty()` to pretty print any type
- `VideoIncludes` is now a bitfield struct to enforce correctness
- removed `datatypes.EnglishName` and `datatypes.EnglishNames`. Use the channel ID to identify VTubers.
- added more organizations to `datatypes.Organizations`
- `Pager` now stores the total number of items

owner_bio: I code cool stuff. Student of Singapore Institute of Technology.
